text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I invite Trainer Kiryuin out to the park<n>for a day of
rest and relaxation...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
It's been a while since I've come to<n>the park for
reasons outside of work!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
...I played at the park by myself a lot<n>when I was
young.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
D-don't get me wrong, I had friends!<n>But I also
liked to play alone.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: For instance, I used to gaze up at thesky while I was on top of the junglegym and read Twinkle Monthly...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Or I would sit on the swing and read<n>the
Trainer's Handbook...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: You know, fun stuff like that!
choice_data_list: That sounds more like studying to me...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's not all I did! Since you're so<n>curious, I
also enjoyed the rest of the<n>playground too!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: The seesaw, the horizontal bar, and<n>so on...
choice_data_list: Did you play alone on the seesaw?
Are you pretty good on the horizontal bar?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. As an adult, I couldn't<n>recommend this to
children, but...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I would stand on one the end of the<n>seesaw and
then walk over to the<n>other end. That really
helped me with<n>my balance!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
The trick is to start lowering your<n>stance once
you cross to the opposite<n>side.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
If you want to improve your sense of<n>balance,
doing that over and over with<n>the right posture is
the way to go.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know! I'll just show you. Watch!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
So, you avoid the seat, then extend<n>your spine
nice and straight...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
See? This is the point where it's easy<n>to lose
your balance, but...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Kiryuin extends both of her hands out<n>to keep her
balance. She looks quite<n>proud as she crosses
the seesaw.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Not bad, right? My friends always tell<n>me that
I've got good balance. I'm<n>very confident in it...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Ah, s-sorry. I'm rambling now, aren't<n>I?
choice_data_list: I'm gonna give it a shot too!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, go for it! I'll be right beside you,<n>so don't
worry!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After making sure there are no<n>children around to
see, I play on the<n>seesaw with Trainer Kiryuin.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, especially pull-ups!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
The trick is to use your strength to<n>gradually get
used to doing it, rather<n>than trying to do it all at
once.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: For starters, just do ten... or even<n>just five.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Results may be the most important<n>thing at the
end of the day, but that<n>doesn't mean you
should ignore the<n>process.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
You'll only find your way to good<n>results if you
have a solid base of<n>hard work!
choice_data_list:
This sounds less like playing and more like
training, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I-if that's the case, then maybe I<n>actually
haven't played at the park<n>before...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A look of shock comes over Trainer<n>Kiryuin's
face as she realizes this, so<n>I invite her to play on
the swings with<n>me.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't really do anything at first,<n>but I got
more and more used to it until<n>I could do a
hundred!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
...Come to think of it, I haven't done<n>any pull-ups
at all lately. Do you mind<n>if I try now?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I cheer Trainer Kiryuin on as she does<n>pull-ups
with a fiercely determined<n>expression.
